description: Cryptographic signature artifact — tamper-evident signing of another artifact's content.

context_schema.subject_artifact_id: string — artifact ID of the signed document
context_schema.signer_artifact_id: string — artifact ID representing the signer identity
context_schema.artifact_hash: string — SHA-256 hex digest of the signed artifact content at signing time

ui.label: Signature
ui.description: Cryptographic signature record for a verified card.
